title: Worst counting solve
note: Worst counting solve: the worst single that counts into the Ao5 (excluding the dropped best and worst).
noteZh: 最差计入成绩：Ao5 去掉最好和最差后，剩余 3 次中的最大值。

sections.title: 2x2x2 Cube
rows: [Newken Nguyen (นิวเคน เหงียน)](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/persons/2020NGUY04)
